description_long: This object is a hand axe featuring a robust, dark metal head and a natural wood handle. The axe head is broad and wedge-shaped, with a flat poll on one end and a sharp, slightly curved cutting edge on the other. The handle is made of light-colored wood, smoothly finished, and gently curved for ergonomic grip, with visible wood grain patterns. The head is securely mounted onto the handle, likely using a traditional wedged fitting. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for chopping wood or similar tasks in urban environments such as parks, gardens, or garages. There are no visible markings, engravings, or labels on either the blade or the handle.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a dark metal wedge-shaped head and a smoothly curved wooden handle, designed for chopping tasks. The axe has a utilitarian appearance with no visible markings or labels.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from an angled perspective, highlighting the broad metal head and the curvature of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: A side profile view shows the full length of the handle and the thickness of the axe head, emphasizing the wedge shape and flat poll.
description_view_2: This view displays the axe from the opposite angle, focusing on the underside of the head and the attachment point to the handle.
description_view_3: A direct side view reveals the sharp cutting edge of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle with the head.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth finish, ergonomic grip, and oval cross-section.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a flat poll and slightly curved cutting edge, no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fitting securing the blade to the wooden handle.
